languages.text: "Небо в символах. Никто вокруг их не замечает. Значит, вы — часть этой жуткой аномалии."
languages.translation_comment: Разово выдаем DL_MindsBlocked_counter +1 вне зависимости от успешности

traits.locale_text: "Небо в символах. Никто вокруг их не замечает. Значит, вы — часть этой жуткой экспозиции."

languages.translation_comment: Разово выдаем DL_MindsBlocked_counter +1 вне зависимости от успешности

languages.text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."
languages.original_text: "Небо в символах. Никто вокруг их не замечает. Значит, вы — часть этой жуткой аномалии."

traits.locale_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."
"The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."
"The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

languages.text: “天空布满了符号，但这里没人能看见。这说明你也是这诡异现象的一部分。”
languages.original_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

traits.locale_text: “天空布满了符号，但这里没人能看见。这说明你也是这诡异现象的一部分。”

languages.text: « Le ciel est couvert de symboles que personne ici ne peut voir. Ça veut dire que vous faites partie de cette étrange anomalie. »
languages.original_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

traits.locale_text: « Le ciel est couvert de symboles que personne ici ne peut voir. Ça veut dire que vous faites partie de cette étrange anomalie. »

languages.text: "Gökyüzü sembollerle kaplı. Buradaki hiç kimse onları göremiyor. Demek ki sen de bu ürkütücü anomalinin bir parçasısın."
languages.original_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

traits.locale_text: "Gökyüzü sembollerle kaplı. Buradaki hiç kimse onları göremiyor. Demek ki sen de bu ürkütücü anomalinin bir parçasısın."

languages.text: «El cielo está cubierto de símbolos y nadie puede verlos. Eso significa que forman parte de esta inquietante anomalía».
languages.original_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

traits.locale_text: «El cielo está cubierto de símbolos y nadie puede verlos. Eso significa que forman parte de esta inquietante anomalía».

languages.text: "Der Himmel ist mit Symbolen bedeckt. Niemand hier kann sie sehen. Das heißt, Ihr seid ein Teil dieser unheimlichen Anomalie."
languages.original_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

traits.locale_text: "Der Himmel ist mit Symbolen bedeckt. Niemand hier kann sie sehen. Das heißt, Ihr seid ein Teil dieser unheimlichen Anomalie."

languages.text: 「空には記号が浮かんでいる。誰もそれを見ていない。つまり、あなたはこの不気味な異常の一部なんだ。」
languages.original_text: "The sky is covered in symbols. No one here can see them. That means you are part of this eerie anomaly."

traits.locale_text: 「空には記号が浮かんでいる。誰もそれを見ていない。つまり、あなたはこの不気味な異常の一部なんだ。」
